tagline: Merchant-facing live cursor preview and same-browser storefront self-test for Ecwid.
shortDescription: Merchant-only Ecwid dashboard for previewing cursor activity and running same-browser storefront friction checks without a database or always-on backend.
privacyContactBlurb: Contact the support channel listed in the live marketplace listing for privacy and data handling requests.
termsWarrantyBlurb: This app is provided as described in the active marketplace listing and any separate merchant agreement published with the app.

technicalNotes.storefrontBehavior: Browser-local storefront event capture for preview mode and same-browser merchant self-tests
